# WiseTwin

> WiseTwin is an industrial training platform (SaaS) built for the AI era. It brings HR,
> HSE managers, training managers and learners together on one connected platform, and
> covers the full spectrum of digital training — from photorealistic 3D digital-twin
> simulators to interactive micro-learning — as a strong, modern alternative to legacy
> LMS and static e-learning.

WiseTwin digitalizes industrial environments into immersive digital twins so teams can
train on exact replicas of their own equipment and sites — safely, without stopping
production. The platform centralizes training plans, learner tracking, certification
and analytics, and uses generative AI to keep content connected and up to date:
importing existing documents into interactive trainings, AI safety assistance, risk
hunting on workplace photos and prevention reporting.

Primary language: French (site available at /fr and /en). Website: https://wisetwin.eu

## Who it serves

- HR teams: onboarding, compliance, training records and certifications in one place
- HSE managers: safety inductions, incident-driven prevention, risk awareness
- Training managers: authoring, planning, tracking and reporting across all formats
- Learners: immersive, engaging trainings accessible from a browser — no installation

## Training formats

- WiseTrainer — immersive real-time 3D simulators of your own facilities: lockout/tagout,
  evacuation, fire safety, chemical leaks, complex maintenance — no risk, no downtime
- SafetyTour — photorealistic virtual site visits for safety inductions
- WisePaper — interactive document-based micro-learning with quizzes, generated from
  your existing PowerPoint, Word or PDF materials with AI assistance

## Key pages

- [Home (FR)](https://wisetwin.eu/fr): platform overview and solutions
- [WiseTrainer (FR)](https://wisetwin.eu/fr/solutions/wisetrainer): 3D training simulators
- [WiseAtlas (FR)](https://wisetwin.eu/fr/solutions/wiseatlas): interactive 4D map for
  territories and industrial infrastructure
- [FAQ (FR)](https://wisetwin.eu/fr/faq): pricing, deployment, data security
- [Blog (FR)](https://wisetwin.eu/fr/blog): industrial training and digital twin insights
- [Home (EN)](https://wisetwin.eu/en): English version of the site

## Company

- WiseTwin is a French company serving industrial companies and territories
- Positioning: a connected, always-up-to-date vision of industrial training in the AI
  era — replacing paper procedures, PDFs and static e-learning with living digital twins
